subcodes.first_line: O Beauty! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Self-Sufficient, the Most Exalted! Repeatedly hath thy mention flowed from the Most Exalted Pen. Rejoice thou and say [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جمال علیک بهاء الله الغنی المتعال مکرر ذکرت از قلم اعلی جاری و نازل افرح و قل لک
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
